heading: Limitation on bonuses to executives of Fannie Mae and Freddie Mac
label: 4518a Limitation on bonuses to executives of Fannie Mae and Freddie Mac
text: Notwithstanding any other provision in law, senior executives at the Federal National Mortgage Association and the Federal Home Loan Mortgage Corporation are prohibited from receiving bonuses during any period of conservatorship for those entities on or after .April 4, 2012
notes: CodificationSection was enacted as part of the Representative Louise McIntosh Slaughter Stop Trading on Congressional Knowledge Act, also known as the STOCK Act, and not as part of the Federal Housing Enterprises Financial Safety and Soundness Act of 1992 which comprises this chapter.
